title: Tower T10012 LED Colour Changing Kettle, 360° Swivel Base, Large Viewing Window, Easy Fill Lid, Removable Filter, 1.7 Litre Capacity, 2200W, Black
features: LED COLOUR CHANGING LIGHTS: Colour changing LED glows blue before and after boiling and red when the kettle is boiling for a fully immersive experience

360° BASE WITH CORD STORAGE: Designed with an accessible 360° rotational base to easily accommodate both left and right handed users. Integrated cord storage keeps your worktop tidy and free from trailing wires
1.7L CAPACITY: Large 1.7L capacity lets you make up to 7 cups of tea or coffee from a single fill – ideal for tackling the breakfast rush or when hosting friends & family
LARGE VIEWING WINDOW: Allows you to monitor how much water is inside the kettle without having to open the lid, whilst the water indicator level ensures you only use the water that you need
3 YEAR GUARANTEE: Trusted Tower quality with a 1 year guarantee & optional 2 year extension, subject to product registration online
description: From the manufacturer Our brand’s strength comes from its heritage – something that can’t be forged and something that allows us to continue offering highly desirable housewares products to a wide customer-base with unshakable brand loyalty. Quality, Innovation and Value Customers' Trusted Brand Healthy Cooking for Decades Desirable Electrical and Housewares Products Boil the perfect morning brew with Tower’s colour changing kettle Make the ideal hot drink in no time with Tower’s Colour Change Jug Kettle. Easily monitor the boil with intelligent LEDs that illuminate blue before and after boiling, whilst glowing red when boiling for an immersive experience. Featuring a 1.7L capacity, you can make up to 7 cups from a single fill, ideal for tackling the breakfast rush, whilst the swivel base makes it ideal for both right and left handed use. 360° swivel base is perfect for left or right-handed users One touch flip lid for simple, spill-free refilling 1.7L capacity brews up to 7 cups in one fill LED lights glow blue & turn red when boiling and back to blue when ready EASY FILL FLIP LID & LIMESCALE FILTER One touch flip-open lid offers simple and spillage free refilling, whilst the filter can be easily removed for fuss-free cleaning to ensure every cup tastes its best LED COLOUR CHANGING LIGHTS Colour changing LED glows blue before and after boiling and red when the kettle is boiling for a fully immersive experience 360° SWIVEL BASE Designed with an accessible 360° rotational base to easily accommodate both left and right handed users
